message:
🌱 Add ollama: AMD GPU & ROCm support mission (#974)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-738-amd-gpu-rocm-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: AMD GPU & ROCm support",
+    "description": "AMD GPU & ROCm support. Requested by 61+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Ollama version:\n```bash\nollama version\n```\nThis feature requires Ollama with AMD ROCm support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review AMD GPU and ROCm requirements",
+        "description": "Ollama supports AMD GPUs via ROCm. Requirements:\n- AMD GPU with ROCm support (e.g., RX 7900 XT, RX 6800, etc.)\n- ROCm drivers installed on the host system\n- For Docker: use the `ollama/ollama:rocm` image tag\n\nCheck if ROCm is available:\n```bash\nrocminfo 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo \"ROCm not installed\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Run Ollama with AMD GPU support",
+        "description": "For native installation, Ollama auto-detects AMD GPUs with ROCm drivers.\n\nFor Docker with AMD GPU:\n```bash\ndocker run -d \\\n  --device /dev/kfd \\\n  --device /dev/dri \\\n  -v ollama:/root/.ollama \\\n  -p 11434:11434 \\\n  --name ollama \\\n  ollama/ollama:rocm\n```\n\nVerify GPU detection:\n```bash\nollama ps\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify AMD GPU acceleration works",
+        "description": "Run a model and check that it uses the GPU:\n```bash\nollama run llama3 \"Hello, world!\"\n```\nCheck the Ollama logs for GPU detection messages confirming ROCm library loading."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "AMD GPU acceleration via ROCm is now supported in Ollama. Users can run models on AMD GPUs either natively (with ROCm drivers) or via Docker using the ollama/ollama:rocm image.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "ollama",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature"
+    ],
